examples.title: Algorithm: Service Lifecycle
examples.description: Demonstrates the lifecycle of a service
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ServiceLifecycle
INPUT: none
OUTPUT: none

BEGIN
 onCreate()
 WHILE running
 onStartCommand()
 onBind()
 onUnbind()
 onDestroy()
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the service lifecycle
